title: CLI Plugin Commands
steps: Add nested PluginCommand enum with validate, inspect, and test subcommands.
Print JSON summaries for machine-readable output, following existing analyze/stats/report style.
Return non-zero errors for invalid manifests and failed plugin tests.
convergence_criteria: revdeck plugin validate <manifest> returns success JSON for valid fixture.
revdeck plugin inspect <manifest> shows capabilities and permissions.
revdeck plugin test <plugin-dir> runs manifest and dry-run fixture checks.

result.summary: CLI exposes revdeck plugin validate, inspect, and test with JSON output.
result.tests_passed: cargo run and installed revdeck plugin validate/inspect/test passed
